name: Chicken Pesto Vegetable Stir-Fry with Fettuci
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole broiler-fryer chicken breasts, halved, boned, skinned and cut into bite-sized pieces
2 medium zucchini, quartered lengthwise and cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine according to package directions; drain and set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together broth, pesto, tomato sauce, bouillon granules, salt, and pepper; set aside.
3. In a large frying pan, melt 2 tablespoons butter over medium-high heat. Add olive oil.
4. Add chicken, cauliflower, broccoli, zucchini, and carrots to the pan. Cook, stirring, for about 10 minutes or until the chicken is brown and vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in pesto mixture and red wine; bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 3 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in remaining butter into cooked fettuccine.
8. Place fettuccine in a large shallow dish and spoon the chicken mixture over the pasta.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese. Makes 6 servings.
